title: schoenus andrewsii
intro: Schoenus andrewsii, also known as Andrew's sedge or Andrew's grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schoenus andrewsii include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory ailments.
